search_terms_used: nutrition endurance running performance systematic review PubMed
carbohydrate protein fat endurance athletes diet research
energy availability endurance runners RED-S relative energy deficiency
dietary intake distance runners nutritional habits survey study
sports nutrition endurance athletes guidelines position statement
periodized carbohydrate availability endurance athletes performance meta-analysis PubMed
protein requirements endurance athletes recovery adaptation systematic review PubMed

beetroot juice nitrate endurance running performance systematic review PubMed
hydration endurance running performance systematic review dehydration marathon PubMed
coverage_notes: Strong coverage across macronutrient guidelines (ACSM position stand), carbohydrate periodization, protein supplementation, dietary intake surveys of runners, energy availability/RED-S, iron deficiency, caffeine ergogenics, nitrate supplementation, hydration, and popular diets. Includes 4 systematic reviews/meta-analyses, 1 consensus statement, 1 cross-sectional survey, 1 retrospective analysis, and 3 review papers. Running-specific populations well represented. Gap: no paper specifically on gut training or race-day fueling strategies.

papers.title: Nutrition and Supplement Update for the Endurance Athlete: Review and Recommendations
papers.notes: Reviewed and updated macronutrient, hydration, and supplement recommendations (nitrates, caffeine, antioxidants, probiotics) for endurance athletes.

papers.title: Nutrition for endurance sports: marathon, triathlon, and road cycling
papers.notes: Reviewed carbohydrate, fluid, and sodium strategies for marathon, triathlon, and road cycling with individualized fueling guidelines by exercise duration.

papers.title: Performance effects of periodized carbohydrate restriction in endurance trained athletes - a systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.journal: Journal of the International Society of Sports Nutrition
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed 9 studies examining whether periodized carbohydrate restriction (train-low strategies) enhances endurance performance versus standard high-carbohydrate availability.

papers.title: Protein supplementation increases adaptations to endurance training: A systematic review and meta-analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed effects of protein supplementation combined with endurance training on aerobic capacity, lean mass, and time trial performance.

papers.title: Dietary Intake of Recreational Endurance Runners Associated with Race Distance-Results from the NURMI Study (Step 2)
papers.notes: Surveyed dietary intake of 211 recreational endurance runners across 10-km, half-marathon, and marathon/ultra-marathon distance groups using food frequency questionnaires.

papers.title: Nutritional Intake and Energy Availability of Collegiate Distance Runners
papers.journal: Journal of the American College of Nutrition
papers.notes: Assessed dietary intake and energy availability of 41 collegiate distance runners, finding inadequate carbohydrate, calcium, and vitamin D intake relative to training demands.

papers.title: Low Energy Availability and Relative Energy Deficiency in Sport: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed 46 studies on prevalence of low energy availability (44.7% of athletes) and its associations with bone health, performance, and metabolic markers across sports.

papers.title: Iron and the endurance athlete
papers.notes: Reviewed iron's role in endurance performance, mechanisms of exercise-induced iron loss (hepcidin, hemolysis), prevalence of deficiency, and screening/supplementation guidelines.

papers.title: Effects of Caffeine Intake on Endurance Running Performance and Time to Exhaustion: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
papers.notes: Meta-analyzed 21 RCTs examining caffeine's ergogenic effect on endurance running time-to-exhaustion and time-trial performance across recreational and trained runners.

papers.title: Effects of Beetroot Juice Supplementation on Cardiorespiratory Endurance in Athletes. A Systematic Review
papers.notes: Systematically reviewed 23 studies on beetroot juice supplementation and its effects on cardiorespiratory endurance performance via nitrate-nitric oxide pathway.
